journey.name: Testing Generations Loading
journey.description: Testing to see if loading different generations from the server in odd or any order of loading works well, in that it shouldn't matter what order you filter generations, the details navigation works.

actions.action: Filter the Pokemon list to Gen III (3)
Wait to see the details page for Torchic.
Assert the screen showing tabs (About, Base stats, evolution, moves)
Scroll slowly through the About tab to see the breeding informatio
